name: Dusky Gopher Frog
habitatType: Longleaf pine forest and ephemeral ponds
conservationEfforts: Captive breeding at multiple US zoos. Prescribed burning maintains pine savanna habitat. Critical habitat designation protects potential reintroduction sites.
description: One of the most endangered amphibians in North America, surviving in just a few ponds in Mississippi. It depends on longleaf pine forests maintained by frequent fire.
